response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched video, identified performer as Juufutei Raden. 2. Identified song title '出囃子ジャポニズム' (Shutsugi Japonism) from top-left text. 3. Performed search for '出囃子ジャポニズム 歌詞', but no official lyrics found as it is an original song. 4. Provided a transcription of the lyrics based on the audio for the JSON structure. 5. Mapped the scenes: 00:00-00:10 as intro, 00:10-end as performance and talk.
response.global_summary: The video features a 3D live performance by the VTuber Juufutei Raden, debuting her new outfit. The performance includes the song 'Shutsugi Japonism' followed by an audience talk segment.

scenes.description: The video begins with the performer dancing. The text '出囃子ジャポニズム' (Shutsugi Japonism) is visible in the top-left corner, indicating the song title. No vocal music is playing.

The song 'Shutsugi Japonism' begins, and the performer sings and dances. Lyrics are displayed on screen. The song continues until the end of the video as the performer transitions into a talking segment about her new outfit and her 1 million subscriber milestone.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
浪漫を抱いた人生を
丸ごと賭けて歌舞伎ましょ
刹那に生きた足跡を
偉大な先人と共に
洒落た口火切って手招き
手招く芸事の深淵
相反する感情
愛憎超えていく感動
遥か遠く世界越え宇宙まで
この想い果てしなく届けたい
オリエンタル　オクシデンタル
どちらも愛しちゃって
掻き立てる衝動が加速する
創造の世界へと飛び込んで
小唄に乗せて
寄ってらっしゃい見てらっしゃい
(注:本楽曲は出演者のオリジナル曲であり、公式の歌詞は検索で見つかりませんでした。上記は分析のために文字起こしされたものです。
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Embrace the life that held romance, risk it all and let's go kabuki.
The footprints lived in the moment, together with the great predecessors.
Light the stylish match and beckon, the abyss of the performing arts beckons.
Contradictory emotions, excitement that goes beyond love and hate.
Far away, beyond the world, to the universe, I want to deliver this boundless feeling.
Oriental, Occidental, I love them both.
The impulse that stirs accelerates, jumping into the world of creation.
Put it on a ditty, come closer and see.
(Note: As this is an original song by the performer, official lyrics were not available via search; the above is a transcription for the purpose of this analysis.)
